synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2417 Oracle Linux 8 gnome-settings-daemon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2417
description:
[3.32.0-22]
- Debounce mount checks in Low Disk Space monitoring
  Resolves: RHEL-127805
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2417

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2417.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
gnome-settings-daemon-3.32.0-22.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
gnome-settings-daemon-3.32.0-22.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/gnome-settings-daemon-3.32.0-22.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[3.32.0-22]
- Debounce mount checks in Low Disk Space monitoring
  Resolves: RHEL-127805
